  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to analyze proteins associated with replicating DNA strands using enrichment and sequencing methods. It involves chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) to isolate protein-DNA complexes and subsequent sequencing to identify specific proteins.",

    "The scientist then transfers the sample from the centrifuge tube into a tube with a blue lid.",
    "The scientist places the tube with the sample into an ice bath."
  ],

    "Microtube rack"
  ],
